check_script_lines: message='Windows FAN 로그 점검을 수행할 수 없습니다.',
message='Windows FAN 로그 점검 명령 실행에 실패했습니다.',
message='FAN 장치 또는 이벤트 로그 점검 결과가 비어 있습니다.',
keyword for keyword in failure_keywords if keyword.lower() in text.lower()
message='FAN 로그 결과에서 실패 키워드가 확인되었습니다.',
message='FAN 장치 또는 이벤트 로그 JSON을 해석하지 못했습니다.',
no_fan_data = not bool(parsed.get('FanDataExposed')) if isinstance(parsed, dict) else True
no_event_data = not bool(parsed.get('EventDataExposed')) if isinstance(parsed, dict) else True
for entry in _as_list(parsed.get('Fans', [])) if isinstance(parsed, dict) else []:
for entry in _as_list(parsed.get('Events', [])) if isinstance(parsed, dict) else []:
if status and status not in ('ok', 'operating normally'):
if config_error and config_error not in ('0', ''):
message='최근 30일 내 FAN 관련 경고/오류 이벤트가 기준치를 초과했습니다.',
reasons = '최근 30일 FAN/냉각 관련 이벤트 로그를 점검한 결과 이상 징후가 없습니다.'
reasons = '최근 30일 내 FAN 관련 경고/오류 이벤트가 없습니다.'
reasons = 'Win32_Fan 장치 정보 노출 여부와 무관하게 최근 30일 내 FAN 관련 경고/오류 이벤트가 없습니다.'
f'Windows FAN 로그 점검이 정상입니다. 현재 상태: \n'
f'FAN 장치 정보 {len(fan_entries)}개, 비정상으로 해석된 장치 {len(abnormal_fan_entries)}개 및 {json.dumps(abnormal_fan_entries)} \n'

results.message: Windows FAN 로그 점검 명령 실행에 실패했습니다.
results.stderr: REPLAY_MISS: expected exact:$f=Get-CimInstance Win32_Fan -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $e=Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='System';StartTime=(Get-Date).AddDays(-30);Level=@(1,2,3)} -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Message -match '(?i)\bfan\b|fan fail|cooling|thermal|overheat|fan speed too low|failure detected' }; $result=[ordered]@{FanDataExposed=[bool]$f; EventDataExposed=[bool]$e; Fans=@($f | Select-Object Name,Status,DesiredSpeed,VariableSpeed,Availability,ConfigManagerErrorCode); Events=@($e | Select-Object -First 50 TimeCreated,ProviderName,Id,LevelDisplayName,@{N='Message';E={($_.Message -replace '\r?\n',' ')}})}; $result | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4 but got winrm command: $OutputEncoding = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false); [Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false); $f=Get-CimInstance Win32_Fan -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $e=Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='System';StartTime=(Get-Date).AddDays(-30);Level=@(1,2,3)} -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Message -match '(?i)\bfan\b|fan fail|cooling|thermal|overheat|fan speed too low|failure detected' }; $result=[ordered]@{FanDataExposed=[bool]$f; EventDataExposed=[bool]$e; Fans=@($f | Select-Object Name,Status,DesiredSpeed,VariableSpeed,Availability,ConfigManagerErrorCode); Events=@($e | Select-Object -First 50 TimeCreated,ProviderName,Id,LevelDisplayName,@{N='Message';E={($_.Message -replace '\r?\n',' ')}})}; $result | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4
results.raw_output:
[점검 단계 1]
 - 실행 명령어: $OutputEncoding = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false); [Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false); $f=Get-CimInstance Win32_Fan -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $e=Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='System';StartTime=(Get-Date).AddDays(-30);Level=@(1,2,3)} -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Message -match '(?i)\bfan\b|fan fail|cooling|thermal|overheat|fan speed too low|failure detected' }; $result=[ordered]@{FanDataExposed=[bool]$f; EventDataExposed=[bool]$e; Fans=@($f | Select-Object Name,Status,DesiredSpeed,VariableSpeed,Availability,ConfigManagerErrorCode); Events=@($e | Select-Object -First 50 TimeCreated,ProviderName,Id,LevelDisplayName,@{N='Message';E={($_.Message -replace '\r?\n',' ')}})}; $result | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4
 - 명령 종료코드: rc=1 (일반 오류 또는 결과 없음/미일치)
 - 출력 내용: REPLAY_MISS: expected exact:$f=Get-CimInstance Win32_Fan -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $e=Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='System';StartTime=(Get-Date).AddDays(-30);Level=@(1,2,3)} -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Message -match '(?i)\bfan\b|fan fail|cooling|thermal|overheat|fan speed too low|failure detected' }; $result=[ordered]@{FanDataExposed=[bool]$f; EventDataExposed=[bool]$e; Fans=@($f | Select-Object Name,Status,DesiredSpeed,VariableSpeed,Availability,ConfigManagerErrorCode); Events=@($e | Select-Object -First 50 TimeCreated,ProviderName,Id,LevelDisplayName,@{N='Message';E={($_.Message -replace '\r?\n',' ')}})}; $result | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4 but got winrm command: $OutputEncoding = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false); [Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false); $f=Get-CimInstance Win32_Fan -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $e=Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='System';StartTime=(Get-Date).AddDays(-30);Level=@(1,2,3)} -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Message -match '(?i)\bfan\b|fan fail|cooling|thermal|overheat|fan speed too low|failure detected' }; $result=[ordered]@{FanDataExposed=[bool]$f; EventDataExposed=[bool]$e; Fans=@($f | Select-Object Name,Status,DesiredSpeed,VariableSpeed,Availability,ConfigManagerErrorCode); Events=@($e | Select-Object -First 50 TimeCreated,ProviderName,Id,LevelDisplayName,@{N='Message';E={($_.Message -replace '\r?\n',' ')}})}; $result | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4
